name: Pro Medicus Limited
analysis: PME has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 49% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$167.7800. Trade idea: entry A$169.5100, stop A$144.0648, target A$194.3136 (0.97:1) — then trail it.
